message:
feat: add title bar with menu, pwd indicator, and running command state

- Add title bar above tab bar with File/Edit/View menus
- Add mobile responsive hamburger menu for small screens
- Support pwd tracking from Ghostty via GHOSTTY_ACTION_PWD
- Show folder icon (📁) when pwd is set
- Show asterisk (*) when a command is running
- Show ghost emoji (👻) as default before pwd is received
- Remove app icon endpoint (no longer needed)
